title: gh#71: R3.6 — Sweep: narrow encryption exports; mark ADR-0002 superseded
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/71.
Backlog section: Candidate 3 — TokenVault.

## Context

Final PR in Candidate 3. After R3.1–R3.5 ship, no caller outside the vault should be importing `encrypt`/`decrypt` directly. This PR confirms that and tightens the boundary.

## Scope

- Verify nothing outside `packages/shared/src/tokens/` and `packages/shared/src/__tests__/` imports `encrypt` or `decrypt`:
  ```
  rg "from '@sms/shared/encryption'|from '@sms/shared'.*\\b(encrypt|decrypt)\\b" packages
  ```
- Narrow `packages/shared/src/index.ts`:
  - Stop re-exporting `encrypt` / `decrypt` as top-level. Keep them importable via the subpath `@sms/shared/encryption` for the vault's internal use.
  - Keep `validateEncryptionKey` re-exported (used by `main()` to construct the vault).
- Update ADR-0002 header to reflect supersession:
  - Add `**Status:** Superseded by ADR-0005 (Candidate 3 shipped).` near the top
  - Existing body unchanged (the historical context is still accurate)
- Write ADR-0005 documenting the TokenVault decision (β + Path A) — see grilling notes for the rationale to capture
- Update `CONTEXT.md` to add `TokenVault`, `Credentials`, `SafeProfile` as domain terms

## Out of scope

- Any behavior changes — verify with full test suite
- Removing the underlying `encryption.ts` module (kept; it's what the vault is built on)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/api build` and test pass
- `pnpm --filter @sms/worker build` and test pass
- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` and test pass
- `rg "decrypt\(|encrypt\(" packages/api/src packages/worker/src --type ts` returns matches only inside the vault module
- `docs/adr/0002-...` shows superseded status
- `docs/adr/0005-tokenvault...` exists

## References

- Closes the TokenVault candidate; supersedes ADR-0002
- Depends on: #67, #68, #69, #70

history.reasoning: Original evidence paths still exist: packages/shared/src/tokens/, packages/shared/src/__tests__/, packages/shared/src/index.ts, and packages/shared/src/encryption.ts. Several parts are fixed: @sms/shared has an ./encryption subpath, packages/shared/src/index.ts no longer top-level re-exports encrypt/decrypt, packages/shared/src/tokens/ contains the shared vault, and docs/adr/0005-tokenvault-typed-credentials-bag-dispatcher-unseals.md exists. The finding is still open because packages/api/src/services/token-vault.service.ts still imports encrypt directly from @sms/shared/encryption and calls it at lines 33-43, which violates the requested sweep boundary of no encrypt/decrypt imports outside packages/shared/src/tokens/ and tests. ADR-0002 also lacks the requested near-top superseded Status line: docs/adr/0002-publisher-receives-raw-profile-row.md starts with the title and body, while ADR-0005 only says ADR-0002 is superseded at line 25. CONTEXT.md did not contain TokenVault, Credentials, or SafeProfile. Verification: pnpm --filter @sms/shared typecheck and pnpm --filter @sms/worker typecheck passed; pnpm --filter @sms/api typecheck failed on an existing-looking unrelated scheduled_at_invalid exhaustiveness error in src/services/post-crud.service.ts:107. Vitest runs could not start under the current read-only sandbox because Vite tried to write node_modules/.vite-temp config bundles.
commands: pwd && rg --files packages/shared/src docs CONTEXT.md | sort
find packages/shared/src/tokens packages/shared/src/__tests__ packages/shared/src/encryption.ts packages/shared/src/index.ts -maxdepth 2 -type f -print

rg -n "encrypt|decrypt|validateEncryptionKey" packages/shared/src/index.ts packages/shared/src/encryption.ts packages/shared/package.json packages/shared/src/tokens/index.ts packages/shared/src/tokens/types.ts

history.reasoning: The original evidence paths still exist, and the current code satisfies the sweep. `packages/shared/src/index.ts` now re-exports only `validateEncryptionKey` from `./encryption-key.js` and does not top-level export `encrypt`/`decrypt`; `@sms/shared/encryption` remains an explicit package subpath. The only production direct `encrypt`/`decrypt` import is inside `packages/shared/src/tokens/vault.ts`; `rg` finds no `encrypt(`/`decrypt(` calls under `packages/api/src` or `packages/worker/src`. The previous open evidence in `packages/api/src/services/token-vault.service.ts` is fixed: it imports `validateEncryptionKey` from `@sms/shared` and `createTokenVault` from `@sms/shared/tokens`, not `@sms/shared/encryption`. ADR-0002 has the requested superseded status at line 3, ADR-0005 exists and documents TokenVault, and `CONTEXT.md` defines TokenVault, Credentials, and SafeProfile. Verification: `pnpm --filter @sms/shared typecheck` and `pnpm --filter @sms/worker typecheck` pass. `pnpm --filter @sms/api typecheck` still fails on an unrelated existing exhaustiveness error in `src/services/post-crud.service.ts:107` for `scheduled_at_invalid`. Vitest commands for shared/api/worker could not start in this read-only sandbox because Vite tried to write `.vite-temp` config bundles under package `node_modules`.
